headline: Techcyte Announces $15 Million Capital Raise Led by Van Tuyl Companies to Support Growth and Path to Profitability
summary: OREM, Utah, April 30, 2026--Techcyte, a leading provider of AI-powered digital diagnostics for anatomic and clinical pathology, today announced the completion of a $15 million capital raise led by Van Tuyl Companies, with participation from existing investors Zoetis Inc. ("Zoetis") and Mayo Clinic.
